title: A way to assign people to pulses randomly
excerpt: I’ve got a long daily task list and several assignees. The goal would be to have assignee assigned to different tasks each day. Randomizing assignees from a list would be cool, or even the ability to assign the next assi…

posts.author: Daniel.Riddle (Daniel Riddle)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve got a long daily task list and several assignees. The goal would be to have assignee assigned to different tasks each day. Randomizing assignees from a list would be cool, or even the ability to assign the next assignee in a list like a counter or step.

posts.author: mmeneses (Matt Meneses)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be neat. I have the same challenge with a board that regenerates a group of weekly standard tasks that get assigned randomly. Even on a schedule will work!

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: This can be done using the Round Robin Pro app. You can create a template based on the list of users and use the monday.com automation to assign tasks to users every day.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: See Round Robin Assignments - monday.com App Marketplace for the well known Round Robin app. All our apps are priced as one-time fees (no subscriptions).
